title: Using Navisworks for MEP Commissioning Support
content:
Navisworks can support MEP commissioning by providing a navigable 3D environment for commissioning procedures, valve and damper location, access verification, and commissioning record annotation. This use of Navisworks extends its value from coordination into construction and handover phases.

Why This Matters

Commissioning engineers working in complex plantrooms and ceiling voids need to locate valves, access panels, test points, and control devices. Navigating a detailed MEP BIM model in Navisworks is significantly faster than reading 2D drawings in a congested as-built environment.

Practical Guidance

Commissioning Viewpoints: Create named Navisworks viewpoints for each major commissioning activity: isolating a chilled water circuit, locating a balancing valve, accessing a fan coil unit. Distribute these viewpoints as a Navisworks file to commissioning engineers as a digital work aid.

Tag and Reference Data: MEP element property sets in Navisworks display commissioning data attached in the BIM model: equipment tag, design flow rate, test acceptance criteria. Commissioning engineers can click on an element to access its commissioning specification without referring to paper documents.

Access Verification Before Commissioning: Before commissioning begins, review access to all testable elements in Navisworks. Identify elements that cannot be accessed without removing architectural finishes or demounting other services. Raise access issues before the commissioning mobilisation, not after.

Commissioning Record Markup: Navisworks viewpoints and redline markup can record commissioning observations: valve positions confirmed, flow measurements recorded at a test point. These markups become a commissioning record linked to the BIM model location.

Checklist

  • Create commissioning activity viewpoints before commissioning mobilisation
  • Verify access to all testable elements in Navisworks before commissioning team arrives
  • Train commissioning engineers to use Navisworks property panel for equipment data
  • Export viewpoint and markup record as commissioning documentation

LUA BIM LABS Insight

Navisworks commissioning support works only when MEP families contain the data that commissioning engineers need — embed commissioning parameters in families during design.
